name: Foreign Tax Credit Carryback and Carryover

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must have foreign taxes paid or accrued that exceed the limitation calculated under section 904(a).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excess foreign tax credits that cannot be used in the current year due to the section 904 limitation can be carried back 1 year and forward 10 years.
